title: corybas oblongus
intro: Corybas oblongus, also known as the Tongue Orchid, is a rare and unique species of terrestrial orchid native to Australia. Its medicinal properties include its ability to be used as an emetic and purgative, as well as its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Corybas oblongus include its potential to alleviate symptoms of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to stimulate digestion and improve respiratory function. In herbal preparations, Corybas oblongus is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety as a medicinal plant.
